from collections import deque


class TaskQueue:
    def __init__(self):
        self.queue = deque()

    def enqueue(self, item):
        self.queue.append(item)

    def dequeue(self):
        return self.queue.popleft()

    def is_empty(self):
        return len(self.queue) == 0


def process_queue(queue: TaskQueue):
    while not queue.is_empty():
        task = queue.dequeue()
        handle(task)


def bfs_traversal(root):
    queue = deque([root])
    results = []
    while queue:
        node = queue.popleft()
        results.append(node.value)
        for child in node.children:
            queue.append(child)
    return results
